TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Bakung_a_niyaru’, title = Bakung_a_niyaru’, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bakung_a_niyaru’} }

S.FORM: Bakung a niyaru' Bakung a niyaru', i sawalian nu makatimul ku aru', anu pakayraen i maka'amis a misilsil, u rinahem ku maka amis, i sawaliyan u tay-ping-yang. teparsa i satipan u Huling, Bataan, Ukang, Puseku calap sa makatimul, i Pusung nu Kakacawan. Nay kaRipunan pangangan han tu "sinsiya" herek sa a palalaedis padudusaan malecad atu nu Tayciw a sinsiya ku ngangan, tuwa balic han tu aniniay a ngangan tu "Bakung". I sawalian nu kalingku ku Bakung, u payniyaru' nu Pangcah i, ira ku Karuruan, Paterungan, Bakung, Cepu', Cawi' ku nikasaniyaru' i matini. U miebaway tu demak nu payniyaru' ku Bakung. (matiya nu Karurungan, Paterungan, Bakung, Cepu', Cawi') mitepar tu liyal atu lutuk nikasaniyaru' sisa mamelaw tu, i lutulutukan atu i liyaliyalan ku Pangcah, saalumanay ku Pangcah itila. Pi'arawan to lakaw 豐濱鄉公所
S.PHON: b~b~vako~u~uŋ a nijaro~u~uʡ b~b~vako~u~uŋ a nijaro~u~uʡ, i sawaɾian no~u~u makatimo~u~uɾ ko~u~u aro~u~uʡ, ano~u~u pakajraən i makaʡamis a misiɾsiɾ, o~u~u rinaħəm ko~u~u maka amis, i sawaɾijan o~u~u taj-piŋ-jaŋ. təparsa i satipan o~u~u ħo~u~uɾiŋ, b~b~vataan, o~u~ukaŋ, po~u~usəko~u~u ʦaɾap sa makatimo~u~uɾ, i po~u~uso~u~uŋ no~u~u kakaʦawan. naj karipo~u~unan paŋaŋan ħan to~u~u "sinsija" ħərək sa a paɾaɾaəɬ~ɮis paɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~usaan maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ato~u~u no~u~u tajʦiw a sinsija ko~u~u ŋaŋan, to~u~uwa b~b~vaɾiʦ ħan to~u~u aniniaj a ŋaŋan to~u~u "b~b~vako~u~uŋ". i sawaɾian no~u~u kaɾiŋko~u~u ko~u~u b~b~vako~u~uŋ, o~u~u pajnijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u paŋʦaħ i, ira ko~u~u karo~u~uro~u~uan, patəro~u~uŋan, b~b~vako~u~uŋ, ʦəpo~u~uʡ, ʦawiʡ ko~u~u nikasanijaro~u~uʡ i matini. o~u~u miəb~b~vawaj to~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u pajnijaro~u~uʡ ko~u~u b~b~vako~u~uŋ. (matija no~u~u karo~u~uro~u~uŋan, patəro~u~uŋan, b~b~vako~u~uŋ, ʦəpo~u~uʡ, ʦawiʡ) mitəpar to~u~u ɾijaɾ ato~u~u ɾo~u~uto~u~uk nikasanijaro~u~uʡ sisa maməɾaw to~u~u, i ɾo~u~uto~u~uɾo~u~uto~u~ukan ato~u~u i ɾijaɾijaɾan ko~u~u paŋʦaħ, saaɾo~u~umanaj ko~u~u paŋʦaħ itiɾa. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw *****
S.FORM: Bakung a niyaru' Bakung a niyaru', i sawalian nu makatimul ku aru', anu pakayraen i maka'amis a misilsil, u rinahem ku maka amis, i sawaliyan u tay-ping-yang. teparsa i satipan u Huling, Bataan, Ukang, Puseku calap sa makatimul, i Pusung nu Kakacawan. Nay kaRipunan pangangan han tu "sinsiya" herek sa a palalaedis padudusaan malecad atu nu Tayciw a sinsiya ku ngangan, tuwa balic han tu aniniay a ngangan tu "Bakung". I sawalian nu kalingku ku Bakung, u payniyaru' nu Pangcah i, ira ku Karuruan, Paterungan, Bakung, Cepu', Cawi' ku nikasaniyaru' i matini. U miebaway tu demak nu payniyaru' ku Bakung. (matiya nu Karurungan, Paterungan, Bakung, Cepu', Cawi') mitepar tu liyal atu lutuk nikasaniyaru' sisa mamelaw tu, i lutulutukan atu i liyaliyalan ku Pangcah, saalumanay ku Pangcah itila. Pi'arawan to lakaw 豐濱鄉公所
S.PHON: b~b~vako~u~uŋ a nijaro~u~uʡ b~b~vako~u~uŋ a nijaro~u~uʡ, i sawaɾian no~u~u makatimo~u~uɾ ko~u~u aro~u~uʡ, ano~u~u pakajraən i makaʡamis a misiɾsiɾ, o~u~u rinaħəm ko~u~u maka amis, i sawaɾijan o~u~u taj-piŋ-jaŋ. təparsa i satipan o~u~u ħo~u~uɾiŋ, b~b~vataan, o~u~ukaŋ, po~u~usəko~u~u ʦaɾap sa makatimo~u~uɾ, i po~u~uso~u~uŋ no~u~u kakaʦawan. naj karipo~u~unan paŋaŋan ħan to~u~u "sinsija" ħərək sa a paɾaɾaəɬ~ɮis paɬ~ɮo~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~usaan maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ato~u~u no~u~u tajʦiw a sinsija ko~u~u ŋaŋan, to~u~uwa b~b~vaɾiʦ ħan to~u~u aniniaj a ŋaŋan to~u~u "b~b~vako~u~uŋ". i sawaɾian no~u~u kaɾiŋko~u~u ko~u~u b~b~vako~u~uŋ, o~u~u pajnijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u paŋʦaħ i, ira ko~u~u karo~u~uro~u~uan, patəro~u~uŋan, b~b~vako~u~uŋ, ʦəpo~u~uʡ, ʦawiʡ ko~u~u nikasanijaro~u~uʡ i matini. o~u~u miəb~b~vawaj to~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u pajnijaro~u~uʡ ko~u~u b~b~vako~u~uŋ. (matija no~u~u karo~u~uro~u~uŋan, patəro~u~uŋan, b~b~vako~u~uŋ, ʦəpo~u~uʡ, ʦawiʡ) mitəpar to~u~u ɾijaɾ ato~u~u ɾo~u~uto~u~uk nikasanijaro~u~uʡ sisa maməɾaw to~u~u, i ɾo~u~uto~u~uɾo~u~uto~u~ukan ato~u~u i ɾijaɾijaɾan ko~u~u paŋʦaħ, saaɾo~u~umanaj ko~u~u paŋʦaħ itiɾa. piʡarawan to~u ɾakaw *****
